---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or change
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
<!-- What's the current state that's painful or impossible? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- What would solve it? Be specific about user-visible behavior. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- What other approaches did you weigh? -->

## Out of scope
<!-- What this proposal does NOT include — helps reviewers gauge breadth. -->
